text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the team's steady improvement, they still
haven't fully regained their confidence since their
crushing loss against Team Zenith.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to pull them out of their slump, I arrange
for a practice match against Team Zenith.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're getting stronger by the day, but Little
Cocon and her team's trust in Ms. Kashimoto
remains unshaken.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nonetheless, Rice Shower and the others are
equally determined to redeem themselves and
train earnestly for the event.
